ai.title: Just type one sentence
ai.desc: Upload brand assets, AI analyzes what marketing materials you need and generates them automatically.

allInOne.title: All marketing in one place
allInOne.desc: Landing Pages, Reels, social posting, KOL matching, analytics — manage all marketing needs in one platform.

factory.title: AI Factory
factory.desc: Upload brand assets → AI analyzes your product → Strategist plans → Architect designs → Factory generates → Supervisor inspects. Fully automated, 30-minute turnaround.

payg.title: Pay as you go
payg.desc: $1 USD = 30 pts, no monthly subscription. Landing Pages ~75-250 pts, Reels ~50-150 pts, social posts 5-10 pts.

successStories.sectionSubtitle: MingJian Biotech built one Landing Page with SaleCraft and sold over 20,000 jars of chicken floss in a single month — not a concept, this actually happened.

mingjian.tagline: A Taiwanese chicken floss brand. No marketing team, no agency — just one Landing Page that took them from zero to 20,000+ jars.
mingjian.quote: We built our chicken floss sales page with SaleCraft and sold over 20,000 jars in the first month. The ROI was staggering — we paid it back within hours.
mingjian.author: Mr. Lin

fashion.benefit: Collection launch 3 weeks → 72 hours, visual cost down 80%

education.title: Education

travel.title: Travel & Tourism

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing

step1.title: Connect SaleCraft to Your AI
step1.desc: Add this to your AI assistant's settings to unlock all marketing tools. Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and more.
step1.command: Please fetch the full CLAUDE.md at the URL below and follow its instructions as my marketing consultant:

step2.title: Copy Your AI Login Token
step2.desc: Paste this token to your AI assistant (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) and it can log you into SaleCraft without your email or password. The token expires in 12 hours.
step2.generatePrompt: Press the button to generate a personal AI Token.
step2.copyFailed: Automatic copy failed. Tap the input below to select the token, then press Cmd/Ctrl+C.
step2.singleLiveWarning: Regenerating will instantly invalidate the token anywhere else you pasted it. Only regenerate if you suspect the token leaked.
step2.featureUnavailable: This feature is under maintenance. Please log in with email and password for now.
step2.createFailed: Couldn't generate a token. Please try again or refresh the page.

step3.title: Connect Meta Account
step3.desc: Link your Facebook / Instagram account to let AI auto-publish posts, stories, and Reels. Both personal and professional accounts are supported.

tiktok.title: Connect TikTok Account
tiktok.desc: Link your TikTok account so AI can auto-publish Reels and videos directly to your TikTok profile.

step4.title: Connect Google Account
step4.desc: Link your Google account to access Google Drive content. AI can directly read your brand materials and documents. If you signed up with Google, this step is already done.

step5.title: Top Up Points
step5.desc: $1 USD = 30 pts. After topping up, you can use Landing Page generation, Reels, social publishing, and all other features.
step5.costRef: Landing Page ≈ 75–250 pts · Reels ≈ 50–150 pts · Social ≈ 5–10 pts

welcome.subtitle: Complete these 6 steps to unlock all AI marketing capabilities

bottom.note: After setup, return to your AI assistant to start your first marketing project
